[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'urgent home pest control' signals consumer stress lifting XLY",
    "family": "consumer_stress",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends weekly search interest",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "A sudden spike in urgent pest control searches indicates rising consumer stress and home maintenance urgency, often preceding discretionary spending rebounds.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLY",
      "rationale": "Increased home-related service searches correlate with discretionary consumer sector demand growth."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter long XLY when 3-week moving average of 'urgent home pest control' search volume rises 25% above its 12-week average",
      "exit": "Exit after 4 weeks or if the search volume drops below its 12-week average",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 18,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Consumer stress-driven home service searches fluctuate often, creating multiple monthly signals."
  },

    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
